data.title: State Street to cover ETFs, tokenized deposits, stablecoins in new digital platform

The endeavor is an attempt by the custody bank to grow in the asset class, which is increasingly becoming more popular. The new digital asset platform is being positioned as a secure, scalable […]

data.title: Beware: New ‘DeadLock’ Ransomware Weaponizes Polygon Smart Contracts to Stay Invisible
data.description:
Group‑IB intelligence reveals the DeadLock ransomware family leverages Polygon smart contracts for dynamic proxy rotation, enabling the malware to evade detection and resist standard domain/IP‑based blocking.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/deadlock-ransomware-polygon-smart-contracts-exploit/

data.title: Ripple and LMAX Strike Multi-Year Deal to Scale RLUSD Across Institutions
data.description:
Ripple and LMAX Group said they have entered a multi-year strategic partnership to integrate Ripple’s USD-backed stablecoin, RLUSD, across LMAX’s global institutional trading infrastructure. The agreement includes $150 million in financing from Ripple to support LMAX’s long-term cross-asset growth strategy.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ripple-and-lmax-strike-multi-year-deal-to-scale-rlusd-across-institutions/

data.title: U.S. Senate delays crypto market structure bill after Coinbase raises objections
data.description:
The US Senate has paused progress on a proposed crypto market structure bill that was supposed to deliberated upon on 15 January.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/u-s-senate-delays-crypto-market-structure-bill-after-coinbase-raises-objections/

data.title: Man Drains $45,000,000 From Banks and Financial Institutions in Historic Heist, Triggering Massive Push for Restitution
data.description:

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/15/man-drains-45000000-from-banks-and-financial-institutions-in-historic-heist-triggering-massive-push-for-restitution/

data.title: XRP Faces $1.20–$1.40 Risk Zone in Worst-Case Scenario, Says EGRAG
data.description:
XRP could still face a deep corrective phase even as its broader bull structure remains intact, according to crypto analyst Egrag Crypto. He outlined what he described as a “nightmare scenario,” framing it as a stress test rather than a shift to a bearish outlook. The analysis focuses on historical cycle behavior visible on the […] The post XRP Faces $1. 20–$1
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-faces-1-20-1-40-risk-zone-in-worst-case-scenario-says-egrag/

data.title: Why are crypto stocks Strategy, Coinbase, Robinhood, and Circle crashing today?
data.description:

Strategy lost 4. 68%. The panic started after a total collapse in Washington. There was a major crypto bill scheduled for a Senate vote. That was supposed to happen […]

data.title: West Virginia lawmaker introduces bill to allow state crypto investments
data.description:
The legislation would allow the state‘s treasury to hold digital assets with a market capitalization of more than $750 billion, which applied only to Bitcoin as of January.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/west-virginia-bill-treasury-digital-assets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
